name: Iso11783IL_PDDSetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDSetValuePhysical
title: Iso11783IL_PDDSetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDSetValuePhysical
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDSetValueRaw(dword ddi, dword elementNumber, long value); // form 1
description: Sets the value of a data entity (process variable) without sending any command.
